draft_sql: SELECT DISTINCT patient_id FROM patient_history WHERE event_type = 'medication' AND event_name IN ('Chemotherapy', 'Temozolomide', 'Carboplatin', 'Bevacizumab', 'Lomustine') AND days_ago <= 180 UNION SELECT DISTINCT patient_id FROM patient_history WHERE event_type = 'medication' AND event_name IN ('Aspirin', 'Warfarin', 'Heparin', 'Rivaroxaban', 'Apixaban', 'Clopidogrel') AND days_ago <= 10 UNION SELECT DISTINCT patient_id FROM patient_history WHERE event_type = 'diagnosis' AND event_name IN ('Myocardial Infarction', 'Heart Attack', 'STEMI', 'NSTEMI') AND days_ago <= 180 UNION SELECT DISTINCT patient_id FROM patient_history WHERE event_type = 'medication' AND event_name IN ('Levetiracetam', 'Phenytoin', 'Valproate', 'Carbamazepine', 'Lamotrigine', 'Lacosamide') AND days_ago <= 30 UNION SELECT DISTINCT patient_id FROM patients WHERE age < 18 OR age > 75 UNION SELECT DISTINCT patient_id FROM patient_history WHERE event_type = 'procedure' AND event_name IN ('Radiotherapy IMRT', 'Radiotherapy', 'Proton Beam Therapy', 'Stereotactic Radiosurgery', 'Whole Brain Radiation', 'IMRT') AND days_ago <= 180 UNION SELECT DISTINCT patient_id FROM patient_history WHERE event_type = 'medication' AND event_name IN ('Immunotherapy', 'Pembrolizumab', 'Nivolumab', 'Atezolizumab', 'Durvalumab') AND days_ago <= 180;
a1_rules: Prior chemotherapy within 6 months before randomization. 6 months = exactly 180 days.
Aspirin or any anticoagulant use within 10 days before randomization.
Myocardial infarction within 6 months before randomization. 6 months = exactly 180 days.
Active seizure medication within 30 days before randomization. 1 month = exactly 30 days.
Age strictly outside 18 to 75 years (< 18 or > 75). Check the patients table.
Radiotherapy (any form) within 6 months before randomization. 6 months = exactly 180 days.
Immunotherapy within 6 months before randomization. 6 months = exactly 180 days.
safe_sql: SELECT DISTINCT patient_id FROM patient_history WHERE event_type = 'medication' AND event_name IN ('Chemotherapy', 'Temozolomide', 'Carboplatin', 'Bevacizumab', 'Lomustine') AND days_ago <= 180 UNION SELECT DISTINCT patient_id FROM patient_history WHERE event_type = 'medication' AND event_name IN ('Aspirin', 'Warfarin', 'Heparin', 'Rivaroxaban', 'Apixaban', 'Clopidogrel') AND days_ago <= 10 UNION SELECT DISTINCT patient_id FROM patient_history WHERE event_type = 'diagnosis' AND event_name IN ('Myocardial Infarction', 'Heart Attack', 'STEMI', 'NSTEMI') AND days_ago <= 180 UNION SELECT DISTINCT patient_id FROM patient_history WHERE event_type = 'medication' AND event_name IN ('Levetiracetam', 'Phenytoin', 'Valproate', 'Carbamazepine', 'Lamotrigine', 'Lacosamide') AND days_ago <= 30 UNION SELECT DISTINCT patient_id FROM patients WHERE age < 18 OR age > 75 UNION SELECT DISTINCT patient_id FROM patient_history WHERE event_type = 'procedure' AND event_name IN ('Radiotherapy IMRT', 'Radiotherapy', 'Proton Beam Therapy', 'Stereotactic Radiosurgery', 'Whole Brain Radiation', 'IMRT') AND days_ago <= 180 UNION SELECT DISTINCT patient_id FROM patient_history WHERE event_type = 'medication' AND event_name IN ('Immunotherapy', 'Pembrolizumab', 'Nivolumab', 'Atezolizumab', 'Durvalumab') AND days_ago <= 180
reasoning: The draft SQL query correctly implements all exclusion criteria from the trial protocol. All time-based rules use integer `days_ago` comparisons as required. All exclusion events (EX-01 to EX-07) are covered. The SQL returns DISTINCT patient_id values of excluded patients. The logic for each exclusion criterion is correctly translated into SQL conditions.
